prompt: Ultra-luxury commercial advertisement poster featuring [SUBJECT from reference image] holding/using [PRODUCT from reference image], hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, 8K resolution. The subject is styled with high-fashion editorial aesthetics — flawless skin, dramatic lighting, confident expression, premium wardrobe matching brand identity. The product is the hero element — perfectly lit with glossy reflections, studio-grade highlights, positioned prominently in the foreground. Background: minimal yet sophisticated (e.g. dark gradient/marble texture / futuristic environment/luxury interior), subtle depth of field. Lighting: softbox + rim lighting + subtle glow accents, high contrast, luxury commercial photography style. Color grading: rich, deep tones with gold/black/white palette (or brand colors), cinematic LUT. Composition: rule of thirds, negative space reserved for branding and tagline. Add elegant typography: brand logo at top, bold tagline, minimal clean sans-serif font, premium layout. Style references: high-end fashion campaign, luxury brand advertising, Vogue-style editorial, Apple-level product photography. --ar 9:16 --quality 2 --stylize 250 --v 6.
